x-enumeration-literals.name: Brand Awareness
x-enumeration-literals.description: Increase the visibility of the brand among the target audience.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Lead Generation
x-enumeration-literals.description: Attract potential customers and gather their contact information for future marketing efforts.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer Retention
x-enumeration-literals.description: Encourage existing customers to continue buying products or using services.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Sales Growth
x-enumeration-literals.description: Boost the sales of specific products or services.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Product Launch
x-enumeration-literals.description: Promote a new product or service to the market.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Engagement
x-enumeration-literals.description: Increase interaction with the brand through likes, comments, shares, or other forms of engagement.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Market Expansion
x-enumeration-literals.description: Enter new markets or target new customer segments.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer Loyalty
x-enumeration-literals.description: Foster long-term relationships with customers and encourage repeat purchases.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reputation Management
x-enumeration-literals.description: Improve or maintain the brand’s public perception.
